detailedDescription:
A generational leap for high-end 4K gaming.
10GB of fast GDDR6X memory and a redesigned flow-through Founders Edition cooler.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: GA102 | Architecture: Ampere
CUDA Cores: 8704 | RT Cores: 68 | Tensor Cores: 272
VRAM: 10GB GDDR6X (320-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 760 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4a, 1x HDMI 2.1
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 4.0)
Recommended PSU: 750W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
